final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original 3x3 character expression grid illustration featuring 赵灵儿 (Zhao Ling'er) from the IP 仙剑奇侠传 (Chinese Paladin), rendered in 3D animation Pixar style.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style rendering with soft subsurface skin shading, expressive cartoon proportions, clean studio lighting per panel
Subject: 赵灵儿 — young woman with long flowing dark hair, delicate fairy-like features, dressed in varied casual modern outfits per panel, consistent character design across all 9 panels
Composition: 3×3 grid, 9 equal panels, each character framed as a bust/shoulder shot peeking through a torn hole in white paper; torn paper edge visible around each panel opening
Scene/backdrop: each panel background is white paper with a ragged circular tear through which the character peeks; minimal background beyond the paper
Lighting/mood: bright, cheerful, even soft lighting per panel; playful and expressive mood throughout
Color palette: each panel outfit uses a distinct saturated color as anchor — green, red, yellow, black-and-white stripe, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal — against the white paper background
Text (verbatim): "仙剑奇侠传" "赵灵儿"
Constraints: all 9 panels must depict the same character (赵灵儿) with consistent face, hair, and proportions; each panel must show a unique expression + action + outfit combination as specified; torn paper framing must appear in every panel; grid must be clearly 3 columns × 3 rows
Panel details (row by row, left to right):
  Top-left — expression: winking, action: adjusting glasses, outfit: green sweater
  Top-center — expression: smirking, action: lowering dark sunglasses, outfit: red leather jacket
  Top-right — expression: thinking, action: finger on chin, outfit: yellow hoodie
  Middle-left — expression: big smile, action: arms resting on edge, outfit: black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center — expression: smiling, action: thumbs up, outfit: orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right — expression: neutral, action: drinking boba tea, outfit: blue sweater
  Bottom-left — expression: happy, action: waving, outfit: purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center — expression: laughing with eyes closed, action: arms crossed, outfit: pink cardigan
  Bottom-right — expression: silly, action: poking cheeks, outfit: teal sweater
Avoid: inconsistent face shape across panels, deformed hands, floating elements, watermark, text overlaid on character faces, blurry panel borders, generic anime style unrelated to 3D Pixar rendering
